title: hypericum × dawsonianum
intro: Hypericum × dawsonianum is a hybrid plant species in the St. John's Wort family, known for its yellow flowers and medicinal properties. It has been traditionally used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and mild depression due to its antidepressant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of hypericin and hyperforin. The plant's health benefits also include wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Hypericum × dawsonianum is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can be used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation, improve mood, and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
